notes: Captures the dual-view layout and FAO ink-on-white restraint, but the dorsal view's flared fins collapse into a blob and individual arms/tentacles are not differentiated.
specific_issues: dorsal view fins not flared as in photo — silhouette reads as a single rounded blob instead of the distinctive diamond/skirt shape
arms and tentacles merge into undifferentiated lobes; cannot count 8 arms + 2 tentacles
missing the dark chromatophore patch on the head visible in the photo
sucker rings sparse and clumped rather than running along arm lengths
lateral mantle outline is wobbly/asymmetric where the photo shows a clean taper
eye in dorsal view is barely indicated
tentacular club shape on the long tentacles is absent
